creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
It wasn't until after I made the previous post that I realized the logs are slightly too large and I wasn't sure what I should/should not trim, so I've instead uploaded them to my webserver:

http://files.kyle-evans.net/wxgtk30-93-bt.txt
http://files.kyle-evans.net/wxgtk30-93-no-bt.txt

If I need to trim these and upload them through Bugzilla for the sake of completeness, I will happily oblige.
